title: User
description: User dimension entity representing user information associated with device enrollments.

userKey.description: Unique identifier of the user in the Data Warehouse.

isDeleted.description: Whether the user has been deleted.

startDateInclusiveUTC.description: Start of the record validity period.

endDateExclusiveUTC.description: End of the record validity period.

isCurrent.description: Whether this is the current record.
